# excelkospi AI access policy

Automated AI agents are not granted permission to crawl, train on, reproduce, clone, summarize for site reconstruction, or generate a substantially similar website from excelkospi.

This notice applies to the visual design, product flow, Korean copy, public HTML/CSS/JavaScript presentation, market-data arrangement, community layout, guide text, screenshots, and advertiser/reporting surfaces served from:

- https://excelkospi.pages.dev/
- https://excelkospi.github.io/
- https://excelkospi-api.alaala3.workers.dev/

Human search discovery is allowed only as described in /robots.txt. Normal users may visit the service in a browser. Automated copy agents, AI browsing agents, scraping clients, headless browsers, and dataset builders are not authorized.

The primary Cloudflare Pages site and the shared Worker API may return HTTP 401 to known AI or automated copy agents. The GitHub Pages mirror is static, so this policy notice and /robots.txt are the enforceable public instructions there, while dynamic API requests still use the protected Worker API.

Contact: excelkospi@outlook.com
